series_metadata.series_description: File containing employee position/salary history, tax certification (W-4 (Federal)Employee's Withholding Allowance Certificate, IT-4 (Ohio) Employee's Withholding Exemption Certificate, IT-4NR (Ohio) Employee's Statement of Residency in a Reciprocity State, City of Residence - Income Tax Withholding form), deduction authorizations (supplemental insurance, deferred compensation, direct deposit, union information, OPERS buyback, involuntary deductions, charitable), tuition reimbursement information, previous service, OPERS forms, employee related correspondence and/or general information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: file is saved electronically ; Electronic: 40 years
